item.title: OptaAnalyst: Opta Analyst @OptaAnalyst · 4s Three of the four UEFA Champions League quarter-finals saw the home team lose in the firs
item.description:
Opta Analyst @OptaAnalyst · 4s Three of the four UEFA Champions League quarter-finals saw the home team lose in the first leg.
The Opta supercomputer doesn't give any of the losing teams from last week more than a 21.1% chance of overturning their deficit.
#UCL

item.title: Everton: Everton @Everton · 30s We are deeply saddened to learn of the passing of former player Henry Newton, who made 85 Everton
item.description:
Everton @Everton · 30s We are deeply saddened to learn of the passing of former player Henry Newton, who made 85 Everton appearances, scoring six goals, between 1970 and 1973.
The thoughts of everyone at the Club are with his family, friends and loved ones. 1 3 23 105

item.title: JackPittBrooke: Jack Pitt-Brooke @JackPittBrooke · 32s My "no rift between the captain and coach" video has people asking a lot of quest
item.description: Jack Pitt-Brooke @JackPittBrooke · 32s My "no rift between the captain and coach" video has people asking a lot of questions already answered by my video. Cita England Cricket @englandcricket · 1h Ben Stokes Brendon McCullum 7

item.title: FabrizioRomano: Fabrizio Romano @FabrizioRomano · 1min Lamine Yamal: “I hope Neymar Jr will be at the 2026 World Cup. He’s an inspirati
item.description: Fabrizio Romano @FabrizioRomano · 1min Lamine Yamal: “I hope Neymar Jr will be at the 2026 World Cup. He’s an inspiration for me, an idol since I was a kid”. 153 113 1 mil 11 mil
